final:
module top_module(
    input [1:0] I0,
    input [1:0] I1,
    output [1:0] O,
    input CIN
);assign O = 2'((2'(({1'b0,CIN}) + I0)) + I1);
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      O <= 2'b0; // Misleading reset
      if (CIN) begin
        O <= I0; // Misleading enable
      end else begin
        O <= I1; // Misleading update
      end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
O <= 2'b0; // Misleading reset
if (CIN) begin
  O <= I0; // Misleading enable
end else begin
  O <= I1; // Misleading update
end
